Title: Vitamin C Brightening Serum
Body (HTML): A stabilised 10% Vitamin C serum that targets dullness and uneven tone. Lightweight, fast-absorbing, suitable for daily use.
Ingredients: Aqua, Ascorbic Acid (10%), Propylene Glycol, Glycerin, Ferulic Acid, Tocopherol, Sodium Hyaluronate, Panthenol, Citric Acid, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin.
How To Use: Apply 3–4 drops to clean, dry skin in the morning before moisturiser. Follow with sunscreen. Patch test before first use. Store away from direct sunlight.

Title: Niacinamide Clarifying Serum
Body (HTML): 10% Niacinamide with zinc to help regulate oil, reduce the look of pores and calm breakout-prone skin.
Ingredients: Aqua, Niacinamide (10%), Zinc PCA (1%), Glycerin, Pentylene Glycol, Sodium Hyaluronate, Allantoin, Panthenol, Xanthan Gum, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin.
How To Use: Apply 3–4 drops to clean skin morning and night, before moisturiser. Introduce gradually if new to niacinamide. Patch test before first use.

Title: Hydra Glow Moisturizer
Body (HTML): A hyaluronic acid moisturiser that holds hydration for 24 hours without a heavy finish. Fragrance-free.
Ingredients: Aqua, Glycerin, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Cetearyl Alcohol, Sodium Hyaluronate, Squalane, Panthenol, Tocopherol, Allantoin, Xanthan Gum, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin.
How To Use: Apply to clean skin morning and night, after serum. Warm between fingertips and press gently into face and neck. Fragrance-free and suitable for sensitive skin.

Title: Gentle Foaming Cleanser
Body (HTML): A sulphate-free gel cleanser that removes oil and sunscreen without stripping the skin barrier. pH balanced.
Ingredients: Aqua, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Coco-Glucoside, Glycerin, Sodium Cocoyl Glutamate, Panthenol, Allantoin, Citric Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate.
How To Use: Massage a small amount onto damp skin, morning and night. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water. Sulphate-free and pH balanced — will not strip the skin barrier.

Title: Daily Defense Sunscreen SPF 50
Body (HTML): Broad-spectrum SPF 50 PA+++ with no white cast. Lightweight enough to wear under makeup or alone.
Ingredients: Aqua, Homosalate, Ethylhexyl Salicylate, Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane, Octocrylene, Glycerin, Silica, Tocopherol, Panthenol, Xanthan Gum, Phenoxyethanol.
How To Use: Apply generously as the last step of your morning routine, 15 minutes before sun exposure. Reapply every 2 hours outdoors, and after swimming or sweating.

Title: Argan Hair Oil
Body (HTML): Cold-pressed argan oil blended with vitamin E to smooth frizz and restore shine to dry, damaged lengths.
Ingredients: Argania Spinosa (Argan) Kernel Oil, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Tocopherol, Parfum.
How To Use: Warm 2–3 drops between your palms and work through damp or dry mid-lengths and ends. Avoid the roots if your scalp is oily. Can be left in or rinsed out after 30 minutes.

Title: Hair Fall Control Oil
Body (HTML): A rosemary and black seed oil blend massaged into the scalp to support stronger roots and reduce breakage.
Ingredients: Sesamum Indicum (Sesame) Seed Oil, Nigella Sativa (Black Seed) Oil, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) Leaf Extract, Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Tocopherol.
How To Use: Massage into the scalp in sections, 2–3 times a week. Leave for at least 1 hour or overnight, then wash out with a mild shampoo. Patch test before first use.

Title: Sulphate-Free Repair Shampoo
Body (HTML): A sulphate-free formula that cleanses gently while rebuilding damaged strands. Safe for coloured and treated hair.
Ingredients: Aqua, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Coco-Glucoside, Glycerin, Sodium Cocoyl Isethionate, Hydrolyzed Keratin, Panthenol, Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil, Citric Acid, Sodium Benzoate.
How To Use: Apply to wet hair, massage into the scalp and lengths, then rinse. Repeat if needed. Sulphate-free — safe for coloured and chemically treated hair.

Title: Anti-Dandruff Medicated Shampoo
Body (HTML): A medicated shampoo with ketoconazole and zinc pyrithione to control flaking and soothe an itchy scalp.
Ingredients: Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Ketoconazole (2%), Zinc Pyrithione (1%), Glycerin, Panthenol, Citric Acid, Sodium Benzoate.
How To Use: Apply to wet hair and massage into the scalp. Leave for 3–5 minutes, then rinse thoroughly. Use 2–3 times a week until flaking settles, then weekly. Medicated — avoid contact with eyes.

Title: Nourish Body Wash
Body (HTML): A creamy, sulphate-free body wash with glycerin and shea that cleans without leaving skin tight.
Ingredients: Aqua, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Coco-Glucoside, Glycerin, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Sodium Cocoyl Glutamate, Panthenol, Citric Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Parfum.
How To Use: Massage onto wet skin in the shower and rinse. Sulphate-free. Follow with body lotion while skin is still damp to lock in moisture.

Title: Silk Body Lotion
Body (HTML): A fast-absorbing moisturising lotion with shea butter and niacinamide for 24-hour softness. Non-greasy.
Ingredients: Aqua, Glycerin, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Niacinamide, Cetearyl Alcohol, Panthenol, Tocopherol, Xanthan Gum, Phenoxyethanol, Parfum.
How To Use: Apply generously to clean, dry skin — ideally straight after showering. Absorbs quickly and is not greasy. Suitable for daily use.

Title: Medicated Antibacterial Soap
Body (HTML): A medicated cleansing bar for body breakouts and daily antibacterial care. Dermatologist tested.
Ingredients: Sodium Palmate, Sodium Palm Kernelate, Aqua, Glycerin, Triclocarban, Salicylic Acid, Tocopherol, Parfum, CI 77891.
How To Use: Lather onto wet skin, focusing on breakout-prone areas. Leave for 30 seconds, then rinse well. Medicated — for external use only, and avoid the eye area.

Title: Gentle Bathing Soap
Body (HTML): A mild, glycerin-rich bathing bar for everyday use. Fragrance-free and kind to sensitive skin.
Ingredients: Sodium Palmate, Sodium Palm Kernelate, Aqua, Glycerin (15%), Sodium Chloride, Tetrasodium EDTA, Tocopherol.
How To Use: Lather onto wet skin and rinse. Fragrance-free and glycerin-rich — mild enough for daily use on sensitive skin, face and body.

Title: Complete Skincare Routine Kit
Body (HTML): The full routine in one box: Gentle Foaming Cleanser, Vitamin C Brightening Serum, Hydra Glow Moisturizer and Daily Defense SPF 50.
Ingredients: See each product for its full INCI list: Gentle Foaming Cleanser, Vitamin C Brightening Serum, Hydra Glow Moisturizer, Daily Defense Sunscreen SPF 50.
How To Use: Morning: cleanse, Vitamin C serum, moisturiser, SPF 50. Evening: cleanse, moisturiser. Introduce one product at a time if your skin is sensitive, and patch test each.
